message:
fix(cli,storage): lazy config loading, reduce sync lock contention, checkpoint-on-close opt-out

Three themes:

Lazy config loading (list.rs, ready.rs):
- list.rs: defer config/color/width/OutputContext to Text branch only;
  JSON/Toon paths skip config I/O entirely
- ready.rs: replace eager config with lazy load_config_layer() closure;
  defer external DB path resolution until has_external_dependencies()
  returns true; build minimal OutputContext for JSON/Toon early

Sync lock contention (main.rs):
- Auto-import: probe staleness via compute_staleness() BEFORE advisory
  lock; only acquire lock when JSONL is actually newer than DB
- Auto-flush: only acquire lock when command is mutating + auto-flush
  enabled
- try_sync_lock(): use OpenOptions read+write+create (no truncate)
  instead of File::create which clobbered lock file content

Schema and storage (schema.rs, sqlite.rs, create.rs):
- schema.rs: set PRAGMA user_version before apply_runtime_pragmas();
  wrap execute in .map_err(BeadsError::Database)
- sqlite.rs: add conn.set_checkpoint_on_close(false) in
  open_with_timeout(); change load_blocked_issues_from_map param from
  owned HashMap to &HashMap; improve test_open_memory assertion
- create.rs: remove dead all_ids.push line

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
